data.author: cdb0y511
data.message:
A fix for https://github.com/SMRT-AIST/fast_gicp/issues/69. (#79)

Take from https://github.com/rzhao88/fast_gicp/commit/2159f3942dbbd7795f0eceb8cdda57bd298a0a99.
Works on cuda 11.5 and 11.6.
This issue may be caused by the mixed device and host memory usage.
